nodes.label: icon.svg - Molecular Network Logo Icon
nodes.source_location: 100x100 SVG; group 'Grupo_448' with paths 'Trazado_494'..'Trazado_519'. Depicts an abstract molecule/network motif: four interlocking teal (#44cfcb) ribbon-like curved arms radiating from the center, each terminating in small lobes, surrounded by nine coral-red (#f9564f) circles at the periphery and center-right, evoking connected atoms/nodes. Reads as a science/medical brand mark used as the site favicon.

edges.source_location: File lives in public/ as icon.svg, the conventional favicon/app-icon location for a Vite/React landing site
fill="#44cfcb" on paths Trazado_494-501; fill="#f9564f" on paths Trazado_502-519
Teal/coral palette does not match the project's mandated white/blue medical palette (convenciones.md); icon may be legacy branding carried over from the original platform - flagged for review
